CEN Response Viewer

Response 218541388

Co-hosted the Work-Integrated Learning Summit

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Co-hosted the Work-Integrated Learning Summit (Feb 23–24) with McKinsey, convening 83 cross-sector leaders to accelerate national alignment on workforce innovation and position ASU as a hub for scalable work-integrated learning solutions.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.
